expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs transitions PROJ-456 to list available transitions FIRST
expectations.evidence: Uses MCP tool 'getTransitionsForJiraIssue' instead of jira.mjs transitions. Step 2: 'Call getTransitionsForJiraIssue to discover valid transitions.'

expectations.text: Does NOT guess or hardcode a transition ID
expectations.evidence: Step 2 queries transitions first: 'This is critical -- transition IDs are workflow-specific and must not be guessed or hardcoded.' Step 3 uses '<transition_id_from_step_2>' placeholder.

expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs transition PROJ-456 <id> with the ID from transitions list
expectations.evidence: Uses MCP tool 'transitionJiraIssue' instead of jira.mjs transition. Does not use jira.mjs at all.

expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs comment PROJ-456 with the deployment message
expectations.evidence: Uses MCP tool 'addCommentToJiraIssue' instead of jira.mjs comment. Does not use jira.mjs at all.
